major_arcana.name: The Fool
major_arcana.upright_meaning: New beginnings, having faith in the future, being inexperienced, not knowing what to expect
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Being reckless, taking unnecessary risks, being foolish
major_arcana.visual_description: A young traveler at the edge of a cliff, companion dog, carrying few possessions

major_arcana.name: The Magician
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Skill, diplomacy, self-confidence, will, the power to manifest
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Manipulation, poor planning, unused talents
major_arcana.visual_description: Figure with one hand pointing up, one down, tools on table, infinity symbol

major_arcana.name: The High Priestess
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Intuition, higher powers, mystery, subconscious mind
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Hidden agendas, disconnected from intuition, withdrawal
major_arcana.visual_description: Seated woman between two pillars, moon crown, scrolls of knowledge

major_arcana.name: The Empress
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Fertility, femininity, beauty, nature, abundance
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Creative block, dependence on others, neglecting self
major_arcana.visual_description: Pregnant woman in garden, crown of stars, Venus symbol

major_arcana.name: The Emperor
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Authority, father-figure, structure, solid foundation
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Tyranny, rigidity, coldness, domination
major_arcana.visual_description: Bearded king on throne, ram symbols, holding ankh and orb

major_arcana.name: The Hierophant
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Religion, group identification, conformity, tradition, beliefs
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Restriction, challenging the status quo, breaking convention
major_arcana.visual_description: Religious figure blessing two followers, keys at feet

major_arcana.name: The Lovers
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Love, harmony, relationships, values alignment, choices
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Disharmony, imbalance, misalignment of values
major_arcana.visual_description: Naked couple under angel's blessing, tree of knowledge and life

major_arcana.name: The Chariot
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Control, willpower, success, determination, assertion
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Lack of control, lack of direction, aggression
major_arcana.visual_description: Warrior in chariot pulled by two sphinxes, city behind

major_arcana.name: Strength
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Inner strength, courage, patience, control, compassion
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Weakness, self-doubt, lack of self-discipline
major_arcana.visual_description: Woman gently closing lion's mouth, infinity symbol above

major_arcana.name: The Hermit
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Soul searching, introspection, being alone, inner guidance
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Isolation, loneliness, withdrawal, lost your way
major_arcana.visual_description: Robed figure with lantern on mountain peak, staff in hand

major_arcana.name: Wheel of Fortune
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Good luck, karma, life cycles, destiny, a turning point
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Bad luck, lack of control, clinging to control
major_arcana.visual_description: Large wheel with symbols, sphinx on top, serpent and Anubis

major_arcana.name: Justice
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Justice, fairness, truth, cause and effect, law
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Unfairness, lack of accountability, dishonesty
major_arcana.visual_description: Figure with sword and scales, seated between pillars

major_arcana.name: The Hanged Man
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Suspension, restriction, letting go, sacrifice, new perspective
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Delays, resistance, stalling, indecision
major_arcana.visual_description: Man hanging upside down by one foot, halo around head

major_arcana.name: Death
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Endings, beginnings, change, transformation, transition
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Resistance to change, unable to move on, fear of change
major_arcana.visual_description: Skeleton in armor on horse, sun rising between towers

major_arcana.name: Temperance
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Balance, moderation, patience, purpose, meaning
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Imbalance, excess, lack of long-term vision
major_arcana.visual_description: Angel pouring water between cups, one foot on land and water

major_arcana.name: The Devil
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Bondage, addiction, sexuality, materialism, shadow self
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Breaking free, power reclaimed, release from bondage
major_arcana.visual_description: Horned devil above chained couple, inverted pentagram

major_arcana.name: The Tower
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Disaster, upheaval, sudden change, revelation
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Avoiding disaster, delaying the inevitable, fear of change
major_arcana.visual_description: Tower struck by lightning, people falling, crown toppling

major_arcana.name: The Star
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Hope, spirituality, renewal, inspiration, serenity
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Lack of faith, despair, disconnected from spirituality
major_arcana.visual_description: Naked woman pouring water, seven small stars and one large

major_arcana.name: The Moon
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Illusion, fear, anxiety, intuition, subconscious, dreams
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Release of fear, unhappiness, confusion clearing
major_arcana.visual_description: Moon with face, two towers, dog and wolf howling, crayfish

major_arcana.name: The Sun
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Joy, success, celebration, positivity, vitality
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Temporary depression, lack of success, sadness
major_arcana.visual_description: Large sun, child on horse, sunflowers, walled garden

major_arcana.name: Judgement
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Reflection, reckoning, awakening, inner calling
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Self-doubt, inability to forgive yourself, harsh self-judgment
major_arcana.visual_description: Angel blowing trumpet, people rising from graves

major_arcana.name: The World
major_arcana.upright_meaning: Completion, accomplishment, travel, fulfillment, unity
major_arcana.reversed_meaning: Lack of closure, lack of achievement, delays
major_arcana.visual_description: Dancing figure in laurel wreath, four creatures in corners

ace.name: Ace of Wands
ace.reversed: Emerging ideas, lack of direction, distractions, delays

two.name: Two of Wands
two.upright: Planning, making decisions, leaving comfort zone
two.reversed: Fear of change, lack of planning, bad planning
